mapper.sql: be.enterprise_id, be.tenant_id, be.enterprise_name, be.enterprise_code, be.enterprise_type, be.admin_user_id, be.create_user, be.create_time, be.update_user, be.update_time, be.status, be.is_deleted, bu.real_name as admin_name, bu.account as login_account
mapper.select:
select
from biz_enterprise be left join blade_user bu on bu.id = be.admin_user_id and bu.is_deleted = 0 where
and be.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} limit 1

select
from biz_enterprise be left join blade_user bu on bu.id = be.admin_user_id and bu.is_deleted = 0 where
and be.status = 1 order by be.enterprise_id desc

select count(1) from biz_user_enterprise bue inner join blade_user bu on bu.id = bue.user_id where bue.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and bue.is_admin = 0 and bue.status = 1 and bue.is_deleted = 0 and bu.status = 1 and bu.is_deleted = 0
select distinct user_id from biz_user_enterprise where enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and is_deleted = 0
